blended.narrative: Aspen Highlands is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,580 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 33".
